hero.label: PIGGY STUDIOS ORIGINAL
hero.title: Piggy: The Fluffy Boss
hero.description: Meet Piggy—also known as Porky. Professional food beggar, certified snack inspector, and full-time king of the house. His daily routine includes begging for freeze-dried treats, searching for duck necks, taking 14 naps, randomly attacking poor Dauda, and sprinting away the moment he spots a suspicious plastic bag. If there's food nearby, Piggy somehow already knows.

details.label: Weaknesses
details.value: Plastic Bags • Vacuum Cleaner • Other Cats

hero.footerText: Made exclusively for Piggy • Powered by Treats & Chaos 🐾
